narratives.Overview: Implement the packages/core lint engine: parse Markdown to mdast via remark-parse + micromark, execute unified-lint-rule plugins against the AST, and return structured LintResult objects with file path, line, column, rule name, severity, and message. Covers FR-1, FR-2.

items.title: LintResult and LintViolation TypeScript types exported from packages/core
lintFile(filePath: string, plugins: Plugin[]): Promise<LintResult> function implemented and exported
lintString(content: string, plugins: Plugin[]): Promise<LintResult> function implemented and exported
remark-gfm included for GitHub Flavored Markdown support
Violations include file, line, column, ruleId, severity ('error'|'warn'), message
Unit tests cover: valid Markdown returns empty violations, a failing rule returns correct position data, GFM tables are parsed without error
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for packages/core
